Ziggs.trading_pattern: Ziggs outranges your W stars early. Play around minion waves and avoid extended trades until level 6.
Ziggs.ability_to_dodge: Ziggs Q (Bouncing Bomb) — dodge by walking perpendicular to his aim or stay closer to minimize the bounce angle.

power_spikes.enemy: Ludens Tempest completion, Level 9 (W cooldown reduction)

Ziggs.early_game: Stay safe and farm. Ziggs outranges you significantly pre-6. Use your wave push to set up roams after level 6.
Ziggs.mid_game: Look to roam with your ult while Ziggs is pushed. He has poor mobility once you engage team fights.
Ziggs.late_game: Ziggs becomes harder to kill but lacks mobility. Position your team to engage on him and isolate him from peel.
Ziggs.win_condition: Roam frequently post-6 to create map pressure. Use your ult timing to catch Ziggs overextended on side lanes.
Ziggs.scaling: Ziggs outscales slightly — he has better waveclear and siege at all stages
Ziggs.positioning: Stay off the center lane to avoid his Q. Position behind your minions to block poke.

Naafiri.trading_pattern: Naafiri has burst and mobility. Kite backwards when she engages, use your W to create distance.
Naafiri.ability_to_dodge: Naafiri Q (Darkin Salvo) — step to the side or back. Her follow-up dash is where her damage comes from.
Naafiri.early_game: Play safe pre-6. Naafiri wins short trades. Scale up and look to rotate for roams when possible.
Naafiri.mid_game: Use your superior waveclear to control waves. Roam when Naafiri is pushing, catch her when she overextends.
Naafiri.late_game: Teamfights favor you if you position well. Keep distance and wear her down with your stars.
Naafiri.win_condition: Survive early game, scale with roam impact. Win through teamfight positioning and waveclear pressure.
Naafiri.scaling: Even — depends on roam impact and teamfight execution
Naafiri.positioning: Hug the edge of the lane away from her all-in range. Use minion waves as distance.

Fizz.trading_pattern: Fizz is melee but has high all-in threat. Don't extend trades with him; look for short pokes with your W then kite back.
Fizz.ability_to_dodge: Fizz R (Chum the Waters) — dodge the shark by moving perpendicular or away from the center of impact.
Fizz.early_game: Avoid walking into his melee range. Use your W to deter his engage attempts. Farm safely from range.
Fizz.mid_game: Roam heavily post-6. Fizz has limited teamfight if he misses his R. Create advantages elsewhere.
Fizz.late_game: Your sustained damage outweighs his burst in extended fights. Teamfight positioning is key.
Fizz.win_condition: Roam before Fizz can get kills. Win the game through macro play and avoiding his all-ins.
Fizz.scaling: Fizz slightly favored early, Aurelion Sol even late game
Fizz.positioning: Keep distance and avoid extended minion lines where Fizz can engage for free.

Yone.trading_pattern: Yone has range with Q but short trade potential. Poke when he's walking toward minions, back off when he's positioned aggressively.
Yone.ability_to_dodge: Yone E (Soul Unbound) — abuse the cooldown when he returns. Trade hard during this window.
Yone.early_game: Play around his E cooldown. When he dashes away, stay aggressive but don't chase. Respect his Q range.
Yone.mid_game: Roam with your ult while Yone farms. He can follow on his dash but you have the map control advantage.
Yone.late_game: Avoid letting him get into your backline. Position your team to lock him down when he engages.
Yone.win_condition: Generate pressure through roaming. Make picks on isolated targets before Yone can defend.
Yone.scaling: Yone slightly favored — he has better itemization and scales into side lane pressure
Yone.positioning: Stay outside his Q range when possible. Back off when he's walking forward to look for trades.

Ahri.trading_pattern: Ahri has poke with Q but commitment once she uses it. Respect her Q range early, but retaliate when she misses.
Ahri.ability_to_dodge: Ahri Q (Orb of Deception) — this is her main poke, step to the side to avoid the middle.
Ahri.early_game: Respect her Q poke but don't let her free-farm. Use your W for short trades and push her off farm.
Ahri.mid_game: Both champions have roam potential. Prioritize side lane roams where you have more impact than her.
Ahri.late_game: Teamfight carefully — her charm can lock you down. Group with teammates and use your utility.
Ahri.win_condition: Win roaming battles through better map pressure. Use your waveclear to control mid and secure objectives.
Ahri.scaling: Ahri slightly favored due to crowd control — outscales in teamfight utility
Ahri.positioning: Stand outside her Q range when stationary. Walk perpendicular when she throws it.

Zed.trading_pattern: Zed has high short trade damage. Poke with your W when he's going for CS, retreat to safety immediately.
Zed.ability_to_dodge: Zed W (Living Shadow) — he uses this to engage. Back off when you see him clone, he can't all-in without it.
Zed.early_game: Keep range and respect his EQ combo. Trade back when his W is down. Farm safely from your side of lane.
Zed.mid_game: Roam to force Zed to choose between defending and pushing. He's weak in 4v4 teamfights.
Zed.late_game: Zed's single-target focus is less valuable in teamfights. Group and use your AoE to control fights.
Zed.win_condition: Roam early and create advantages before Zed scales. Win teamfights through better teamfight positioning.
Zed.scaling: Zed early game, Aurelion Sol mid-to-late game
Zed.positioning: Stay off side lanes where Zed can isolate you. Group mid for safety.

Ekko.trading_pattern: Ekko is mobile and can burst. Look for pokes when his W is down, then back off as he scales.
Ekko.ability_to_dodge: Ekko W (Parallel Convergence) — dodge the stun zone or get out before it triggers.
Ekko.early_game: Trade when his cooldowns are down. Avoid grouping for his W stun. Farm safely.
Ekko.mid_game: Both scale into roam patterns. Control mid with your waveclear and look for picks on isolated targets.
Ekko.late_game: Ekko's ult keeps him alive in fights. Use your teamfight damage to wear him and his team down.
Ekko.win_condition: Win through consistent pressure and roams. Don't let Ekko free-farm and scale uncontested.
Ekko.scaling: Ekko slightly favored — better itemization and scaling potential with his burst
Ekko.positioning: Avoid standing in predictable patterns where Ekko can land his W zone.

Diana.trading_pattern: Diana is melee with burst. Kite when she walks up, use your W to create distance when she tries to engage.
Diana.ability_to_dodge: Diana Q (Crescent Strike) — dodge sideways or back. Her engage is reliant on this.
Diana.early_game: Play at range and avoid her Q. Use your W to deter engages. Farm safely and wait for roam opportunities.
Diana.mid_game: Roam frequently to deny her kill potential. Diana wants to fight — deny her targets.
Diana.late_game: Teamfights favor you if you position well. Keep distance and use your sustained damage.
Diana.win_condition: Avoid her all-in attempts early. Scale through roams and teamfight positioning.
Diana.scaling: Diana early game, Aurelion Sol mid-to-late game in teamfights
Diana.positioning: Keep distance from her Q range. Back off when she's positioned to engage.

LeBlanc.trading_pattern: LeBlanc is burst-focused. Trade when her combo is on cooldown. Respect her all-in range and use your W defensively.
LeBlanc.ability_to_dodge: LeBlanc E (Ethereal Chains) — dodge sideways or move away. This is her only CC.
LeBlanc.early_game: Farm safely from range. Respect her QW combo but retaliate when she's vulnerable post-cast.
LeBlanc.mid_game: Roam to create advantages elsewhere. LeBlanc has limited teamfight if she misses her chains.
LeBlanc.late_game: Your sustained teamfight damage outweighs her single-target burst in grouped fights.
LeBlanc.win_condition: Scale safely and roam to create advantages. Win teamfights through positioning and AoE damage.
LeBlanc.scaling: LeBlanc early game, Aurelion Sol late game in teamfights
LeBlanc.positioning: Stay outside her combo range. Back off when she's walking to all-in you.

Syndra.trading_pattern: Syndra has poke and CC. Respect her Q zones early, but look for short windows to trade and farm.
Syndra.ability_to_dodge: Syndra E (Scatter the Weak) — dodge sideways or back. This is her only CC mechanism.
Syndra.early_game: Stay at range and respect her Q damage. Farm safely and avoid her E range.
Syndra.mid_game: Roam with your ult while Syndra farms. Use your roam impact to deny her teamfight scaling.
Syndra.late_game: Both scale well — depends on teamfight positioning and who gets picks first.
Syndra.win_condition: Roam before Syndra gets too many stacks. Win through macro pressure and objective control.
Syndra.scaling: Syndra slightly favored — higher spike potential with full stack builds
Syndra.positioning: Avoid standing in lines where she can E multiple orbs toward you.

Cassiopeia.trading_pattern: Cassio has mediocre early trading. Use your W to push her and farm freely. She needs space to farm.
Cassiopeia.ability_to_dodge: Cassiopeia W (Miasma) — wait for it to dissipate or walk around. Don't stand in the poison.
Cassiopeia.early_game: Dominate with your superior waveclear and damage. Push constantly and threaten roams.
Cassiopeia.mid_game: Roam whenever she's pushing. Use your ult timing to create picks elsewhere.
Cassiopeia.late_game: Cassio scales better into sustained fights, but you have better teamfight engagement tools.
Cassiopeia.win_condition: Get an early lead through superior laning. Roam and snowball before Cassio scales.
Cassiopeia.scaling: Cassiopeia scales better late game — you need to finish early
Cassiopeia.positioning: Stay safe from her poison zones. Use your range to attack while staying away.

Orianna.trading_pattern: Orianna is weak early. Use your W to harass freely while she farms. She outscales so finish early.
Orianna.ability_to_dodge: Orianna Q (Command: Attack) — this is her main poke, dodge it or tank it and trade back.
Orianna.early_game: Abuse her weak early game. Push constantly and threaten roams. Poke with your W and farm freely.
Orianna.mid_game: Roam heavily before Orianna scales into teamfights. Create advantages elsewhere.
Orianna.late_game: Orianna outscales in teamfights. Win through objective control before teamfights decide the game.
Orianna.win_condition: Create a lead early and roam to secure objectives. Finish the game before Orianna's teamfight becomes oppressive.
Orianna.scaling: Orianna significantly outscales — you need a lead to win
Orianna.positioning: Stay safe from her ball range. Use your W to keep her off-balance.

Smolder.trading_pattern: Smolder is weak in early laning. Use your W to push constantly and deny him farm. He scales into late.
Smolder.ability_to_dodge: Smolder Q (Breath) — dodge by stepping back or to the side when he casts.
Smolder.early_game: Completely dominate with early waveclear and roam potential. Push him off CS and deny his scaling.
Smolder.mid_game: Roam frequently to create advantages. Smolder is weak in early skirmishes.
Smolder.late_game: Smolder outscales significantly. Finish before he reaches 2-3 items.
Smolder.win_condition: Roam early and snowball. Get kills on side lanes and secure Baron before Smolder scales.
Smolder.scaling: Smolder significantly outscales — you need a major lead
Smolder.positioning: Stay safe and deny him farm. Push waves and roam.

Mel.trading_pattern: Mel has strong early poke with her ability reflect. Respect her reflected damage, trade cautiously.
Mel.ability_to_dodge: Mel E (Reflect) — your star damage reflects back, so angle your W away from her when possible.
Mel.early_game: Trade carefully since she reflects projectile damage. Use your W to farm and avoid direct trades.
Mel.mid_game: Roam heavily while Mel farms. Your roam impact exceeds her early game agency.
Mel.late_game: Mel scales into teamfights with her defensive reflect. Position carefully to avoid wasting your stars.
Mel.win_condition: Roam and create advantages before Mel scales. Win through macro pressure.
Mel.scaling: Mel slightly favored — her scaling into teamfights is superior
Mel.positioning: Angle your W away from Mel to avoid reflect damage on important trades.

Anivia.trading_pattern: Anivia is weak early. Use your W to push and farm freely. Avoid her E (frostbite) when she stuns you.
Anivia.ability_to_dodge: Anivia Q (Flash Frost) — dodge sideways or back. Her E follows up for burst.
Anivia.early_game: Abuse her weak early phase. Poke with W and farm freely. She outscales so finish early.
Anivia.mid_game: Roam to secure kills elsewhere. Anivia needs time to scale.
Anivia.late_game: Anivia becomes very strong. Win through objectives before she becomes unkillable.
Anivia.win_condition: Create a lead early and roam. Finish the game before Anivia outscales.
Anivia.scaling: Anivia significantly outscales — you need a substantial lead
Anivia.positioning: Stay safe from her Q range and avoid her wall.

Corki.trading_pattern: Corki is weak in early trading. Use your W to farm and harass. He needs time to scale.
Corki.ability_to_dodge: Corki Q (Phosphorus Bomb) — this is his main poke, dodge it when possible.
Corki.early_game: Push constantly and deny his farm. He scales into a split-pusher so finish early.
Corki.mid_game: Roam to create advantages before Corki scales into split-pushing pressure.
Corki.late_game: Corki becomes a strong split-pusher. Group and finish the game before he takes over.
Corki.win_condition: Get an early lead and roam. Secure Baron and objectives before Corki scales.
Corki.scaling: Corki significantly outscales — you need a lead
Corki.positioning: Stay at range and avoid his Q poke zones.

Akali.trading_pattern: Akali is melee-focused early. Trade with your W when she walks up, then retreat.
Akali.ability_to_dodge: Akali E (Shuriken Flip) — dodge or get CC'd. This is her engage mechanism.
Akali.early_game: Keep distance and poke with W. Avoid close-range trading. Respect her all-in threshold.
Akali.mid_game: Roam when Akali is vulnerable. She struggles in 4v4 teamfights without ult.
Akali.late_game: Both scale — depends on positioning and who engages first in teamfights.
Akali.win_condition: Roam before Akali scales. Create advantages on other lanes.
Akali.scaling: Akali slightly favored — her scaling into burst is superior
Akali.positioning: Stay outside her melee range and Q distance.

Taliyah.trading_pattern: Taliyah has strong waveclear. Match her push early, then look for roam opportunities.
Taliyah.ability_to_dodge: Taliyah Q (Threaded Volley) — dodge by moving perpendicular to her line.
Taliyah.early_game: Match her waveclear. Farm safely and respect her poke range.
Taliyah.mid_game: Both champions roam. Use superior ult positioning to secure kills or objectives.
Taliyah.late_game: Depends on roam impact. Teamfights favor whoever engages first.
Taliyah.win_condition: Win the roaming meta. Secure kills on side lanes or objectives with ult.
Taliyah.scaling: Taliyah slightly favored — stronger early roaming and engagement
Taliyah.positioning: Avoid standing in predictable lines for her Q spam.

Katarina.trading_pattern: Katarina is all-in focused. Poke when her abilities are down, retreat when she's positioned to engage.
Katarina.ability_to_dodge: Katarina E (Shunpo) — when she dashes in, back off and retreat. Don't trade with her in close range.
Katarina.early_game: Play defensively and farm at range. Avoid her all-in attempts.
Katarina.mid_game: Roam to create advantages. Katarina wants to fight — deny her targets.
Katarina.late_game: Avoid teamfights where she can get resets. Space properly and focus her down.
Katarina.win_condition: Roam and create advantages. Deny Katarina reset opportunities in teamfights.
Katarina.scaling: Katarina slightly favored — her teamfight reset potential is stronger
Katarina.positioning: Keep distance from her melee range. Back away when she uses Shunpo.

Gragas.trading_pattern: Gragas is melee/short-range. Trade when his E is down, retreat when he's positioned to engage.
Gragas.ability_to_dodge: Gragas E (Body Slam) — back off when he dashes in. This is his engage tool.
Gragas.early_game: Play defensively and respect his all-in potential. Farm at range.
Gragas.mid_game: Roam while Gragas farms. He's weak in early skirmishes without ult.
Gragas.late_game: Space in teamfights and avoid being hit by his ult. Use your sustained damage.
Gragas.win_condition: Roam before Gragas becomes a teamfight liability. Create picks on isolated targets.
Gragas.scaling: Gragas slightly favored early, Aurelion Sol even late game
Gragas.positioning: Keep distance and avoid his E range. Back off when he walks forward.

Pantheon.trading_pattern: Pantheon has early game dominance. Stay at range and avoid close trading. Use your W to farm safely.
Pantheon.ability_to_dodge: Pantheon Q (Spear) — dodge sideways or stand behind minions.
Pantheon.early_game: Play extremely carefully. Pantheon wins early all-ins. Farm safely and respect his threat.
Pantheon.mid_game: Roam to create advantages when Pantheon is farming or pushed. He's vulnerable on side lanes.
Pantheon.late_game: Both scale similarly. Teamfights determine the outcome.
Pantheon.win_condition: Survive early game, roam and create advantages elsewhere. Win through objective control.
Pantheon.scaling: Even — Pantheon early game, scaling becomes less relevant post-20 minutes
Pantheon.positioning: Keep maximum distance. Stand behind minions for safety.

Qiyana.trading_pattern: Qiyana has burst and CC. Respect her element advantage and avoid close trades early.
Qiyana.ability_to_dodge: Qiyana E (Audacity) — dash-based engagement, back off when she goes for it.
Qiyana.early_game: Farm defensively. Qiyana has strong early all-in potential.
Qiyana.mid_game: Roam to deny her kill potential. She wants to fight — avoid extended fights.
Qiyana.late_game: Both scale similarly. Teamfight positioning matters most.
Qiyana.win_condition: Roam and create advantages. Win through macro pressure.
Qiyana.scaling: Qiyana slightly favored — her early game agency translates into side lane control
Qiyana.positioning: Avoid narrow angles where she can trap you with her ult.
